howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to turn reviews into social gold
howItWorks.step1Body: Drop in your Google Maps business URL. We'll fetch all your latest reviews instantly.
howItWorks.step2Body: Choose from dark, light, or branded themes. Customize colors to match your brand identity.
howItWorks.step3Body: Get a ready-to-post image with AI-written caption. Share to Instagram, Facebook, or LinkedIn.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does Review to Post work?
faq.a1: Simply paste your Google Maps business URL, choose a design theme, and Review to Post will automatically generate a branded social media graphic featuring your best review, complete with an AI-written caption.
faq.q2: Can I customize the design to match my brand?
faq.a2: Yes! On Business and Agency plans you can set your own brand colors and logo. All plans include multiple theme options to match your aesthetic.
faq.q3: Which social media platforms are supported?
faq.a3: Review to Post generates 1080×1080 images optimized for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. The AI-written caption is ready to copy and post.
faq.q4: Do I need design skills to use Review to Post?
faq.a4: Not at all. Everything is automated — just paste a URL and download your finished graphic. No design experience required.
faq.q5: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a5: Yes. You can cancel anytime from your account settings. No contracts, no cancellation fees.
